description_long: This is a traditional stone water well with a circular stone base and a wooden frame supporting a pitched, red-tiled roof. The roof is constructed from overlapping terracotta tiles, showing some weathering and moss, and is supported by sturdy wooden beams. A metal crank mechanism is mounted at the center, with a rope descending into the well and attached to a wooden bucket, which rests on the ground nearby. The stonework of the well is rugged and uneven, giving it an old, hand-built appearance. The wooden frame features black metal brackets at the joints for reinforcement, and the roof has decorative end caps on the ridge. The well is open at the top, allowing access to the water below, and the overall structure is robust and designed for outdoor use.
description: A rustic stone water well with a red-tiled roof, wooden frame, and a bucket-and-crank mechanism. The well features weathered stonework and decorative roof end caps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular stone well, wooden frame, and the full red-tiled roof with visible moss and weathering.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved profile of the tiled roof, the wooden support beams, and the bucket resting on the ground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden frame, the stone well opening, and the crank mechanism with the rope and bucket.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the roof's curvature, wooden supports, and the bucket with rope more clearly visible.
attribute_well_cover_design: The well is covered by a pitched roof made of red terracotta tiles supported by a wooden frame; there is no lid or slab directly covering the well opening.
attribute_presence_of_pulley_or_bucket_m: A visible metal crank and rope mechanism with a wooden bucket attached, positioned above the well opening.
attribute_surrounding_protective_structu: The well is surrounded by a circular stone wall approximately waist-high, with a wooden frame and roof providing overhead protection.
attribute_decorative_elements: Decorative end caps on the roof ridge; no other visible embellishments.
